allowedMismatches.detail: expected outputs=(uint256) stateMutability=pure, actual outputs=(uint256) stateMutability=view
allowedMismatches.reason: Vendored 6.7.1 IPMarketFactory declares VERSION() pure; deployed PendleMarketFactoryV7Upg implements it view. Read-only relaxation, and Moss never calls VERSION() (the verifier uses isValidMarket/factory/readTokens/expiry/token support/decimals).
